raw_source.title: [城市名] XXXX 公司诚聘 XX工程师 薪水 AAA-ZZZ RMB/USD
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
某cex交易所


## 薪资福利待遇
可发U,薪资open 20K以上

## 地点

- 工作地点：remote
- 联系方式：联系vx: ljlljl269 邮箱:baron.lee@interwinee.com

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是

## 岗位要求、职责
Requirements:

1: At least 2 years of experience in smart contract development, have production-level deployment experience on Ethereum or other blockchain mainnets, experienced with high TVL projects is a nice to have.

2: Deep understanding of the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM).

3: Proficient with current mainstream tools and frameworks for smart contract development, such as Foundry and Hardhat.

4: Familiar with mainstream DeFi projects, as well as commonly used open-source contract libraries like OpenZeppelin.

5: Experienced in smart contract auditing and familiar with the auditing process.

6: Familiar with common smart contract vulnerabilities and keeping up-to-date latest attack vectors.

7: Responsible,self-driven, work independently and as part of a collaborative team.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
